title: Leaderboards
seoTitle: Game Of Darts Leaderboards | BarkinMad Studios
description: Compete with players around the world through Apple Game Center leaderboards and track your best performances across supported Game Of Darts modes.
summary: Compare your best scores, averages, checkouts, and match performance through Apple Game Center.

sections.heading: Compete on the Leaderboards
paragraphs: Game Of Darts includes Apple Game Center leaderboards for supported game modes, giving you the chance to compare your best performances with friends and players around the world.
Leaderboards are available for X01, Cricket, Snooker Darts, Bob's 27, One to 20, Halve It, and other supported categories. Sign in to Game Center to start competing.

sections.heading: How Scores Are Submitted
paragraphs: Supported results, including highest scores, best checkouts, best averages, most 180s, and other qualifying performances, can be submitted to Game Center.
You can control automatic leaderboard posting from the Settings screen whenever supported.

images.caption: Compare your best performances with players around the world.

featureShowcases.heading: Compete Beyond Every Match
featureShowcases.summary: Leaderboards give you a reason to keep improving long after the final dart has been thrown.
body: Every great performance deserves to be remembered. Game Center leaderboards let you compare your best scores, averages, and achievements with players around the world.
Whether you're chasing a personal best or climbing the global rankings, every match is another opportunity to improve.
bullets: Compare scores across supported game modes.
Works alongside achievements and player statistics.

image.caption: Track your progress and compete with players around the world.

featureShowcases.heading: Manage Leaderboard Sharing
featureShowcases.summary: Choose how your scores are shared through Game Center.
body: Leaderboard submissions can be managed from the Settings screen where supported, giving you control over how your qualifying scores are shared.
Once you're signed in to Game Center, every eligible performance has the opportunity to appear on the leaderboards.
bullets: Manage supported sharing options in Settings.
Works independently of local player statistics.

image.caption: Choose how you compete and share your results.
